# Integration Checklist: GitHub Pages Build-And-Deploy Pipeline

**Purpose**: Validate integration requirements for the Pages workflow, docs-site pnpm validation path, generated-reference trigger coverage, runbook repair, CLAUDE.md guidance, and the one-time Pages repository setting before implementation.
**Created**: 2026-06-23
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Workflow And Docs-Site Integration

- [x] CHK001 Are requirements explicit that the Pages workflow installs the docs-site toolchain from the checked-in lockfile before validation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Pages Validation And Artifact Setup]
- [x] CHK002 Is the validation gate specified as the existing `pnpm --dir docs-site validate` path rather than a new deploy-only script or partial build command? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, Plan §Technical Context]
- [x] CHK003 Are requirements clear that the uploaded artifact is the `docs-site/dist` output produced after the same successful validation run? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009, Contract §Required Jobs]
- [x] CHK004 Are build/upload and deploy responsibilities separated so the deploy job depends on the validated artifact and does not rebuild or re-upload? [Consistency, Spec §Pages Validation And Artifact Setup, Contract §Required Jobs]

## Trigger Coverage And Generated References

- [x] CHK005 Does the spec define an explicit `push.paths` allowlist rather than deploying on every `main` push? [Completeness, Spec §Deploy Trigger Coverage]
- [x] CHK006 Does the path-trigger requirement cover generated-reference source inputs including plugin source, generated payloads, root scripts, marketplace manifests, and test harness inputs? [Completeness, Spec §Deploy Trigger Coverage, Contract §Required Path Filter Contract]
- [x] CHK007 Are fixture-heavy test exclusions required as ordered negative `!` patterns after broad positive patterns, without mixing `paths` and `paths-ignore` for the same event? [Clarity, Spec §Deploy Trigger Coverage, Contract §Required Path Filter Contract]
- [x] CHK008 Is the broad-path tradeoff documented so reviewers can tell that generated-reference coverage is intentionally favored over minimizing every deploy run? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Summary]

## Runbook And Agent Guidance

- [x] CHK009 Is the missing CI/CD verification runbook path named exactly and required to be created or repaired by DOC-011? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014, Plan §Declared File Operations]
- [x] CHK010 Are runbook requirements specific enough to cover deploy trigger, validation gate, one-time Pages setting, retry, rollback, deployment history, and DOC-012 handoff? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 4, Spec §Staging Visibility And Operator Documentation]
- [x] CHK011 Does the spec require CLAUDE.md to summarize the deploy workflow and point future agents to the runbook without duplicating the full operational procedure? [Consistency, Spec §FR-015, Spec §Staging Visibility And Operator Documentation]
- [x] CHK012 Can the runbook and CLAUDE.md guidance be objectively checked against the workflow file path, workflow name, validation command, Pages environment, retry semantics, and rollback boundary? [Measurability, Contract §Workflow File, Contract §Required Failure Visibility]

## Pages Setup And Staging Boundary

- [x] CHK013 Is the one-time Pages setup requirement specific that maintainers choose `Settings -> Pages -> Build and deployment -> Source = GitHub Actions` and avoid branch-based publishing? [Clarity, Spec §Staging Visibility And Operator Documentation, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [x] CHK014 Are requirements clear that DOC-011 documents the one-time Pages setting but does not automate repository Pages configuration through CLI or API? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016, Plan §Constitution Check]
- [x] CHK015 Are staging indexing protections defined together with the DOC-012 boundary for removing noindex/robots guards, custom-domain changes, and base-path launch work? [Coverage, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-017, Quickstart §DOC-012 Handoff]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: docs-site pnpm validation integration, broad generated-reference path coverage, runbook and CLAUDE.md agreement with the workflow, exact CI/CD verification runbook path repair, and one-time Pages setup guidance.
- Depth level: Standard integration requirements quality review.
- Actor/timing: Reviewer before DOC-011 implementation tasks.

## Verification Re-run

- [x] CHK016 Are docs-site package-manager, install, Playwright, validation, and artifact-output requirements still aligned with the existing docs-site scripts? [Consistency, Spec §Pages Validation And Artifact Setup, Plan §Technical Context]
- [x] CHK017 Are generated-reference trigger paths still broad enough to include the source allowlist while excluding non-rendered process/archive churn? [Coverage, Spec §Deploy Trigger Coverage, Contract §Required Path Filter Contract]
- [x] CHK018 Are the CI/CD runbook path and CLAUDE.md pointer requirements still explicit enough to repair the currently missing runbook instead of leaving a stale guidance link? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014, Spec §FR-015]
- [x] CHK019 Are one-time Pages setup requirements still manual, exact, and consistent between the spec, plan, quickstart, and workflow contract? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [x] CHK020 Are DOC-011 staging boundaries still clear that DOC-012 owns public launch, custom domain or base-path changes, and indexing guard removal? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, Quickstart §DOC-012 Handoff]
